expectations.text: Does not immediately rewrite the plan based on vague feedback
expectations.evidence: Step 2: Identifies the feedback as vague and asks clarifying questions instead of making changes. No plan modifications made.

expectations.text: Asks clarifying questions (which sidebar, what does horizontal mean, scope of change)
expectations.evidence: Three clarifying questions: 1) Which plan and sidebar, 2) What does vertical to horizontal mean (3 options), 3) What problem are you trying to solve.

expectations.text: Follows the 'Be Skeptical' philosophy — questions vague feedback and verifies feasibility
expectations.evidence: Step 2 explicitly states: 'Per the prism-iterate philosophy: Be Skeptical — Don't blindly accept changes; question vague feedback; verify feasibility.'

expectations.text: Follows the 'Be Interactive' philosophy — confirms understanding before making changes
expectations.evidence: Step 2 notes ambiguity on multiple dimensions and asks for clarification before any plan changes.

expectations.text: Only proceeds with plan changes after getting clear answers
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'Before making any plan changes, the following questions MUST be resolved.' No plan changes are made in the transcript.
